title: Dream: outer left ear felt stiff, and hurt upon inspection
html:
May 2020 dream log — Yahir dreams his outer left ear is stiff and painful; later (annotated in the same note) he discovers the ear actually IS stiff and hurts on impact. Joins the premonition cluster as a body-rather-than-event variant.

yahir gonzalez · dad death premonitions · deja vu
